properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 12/22
 BARENTS WHITE SEAS AND CHYOSHSKAYA GUBA
 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING 16 TO 19 FEB 0700 TO 1300 UTC DAILY  
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 А. 73-07.0N 032-05.0E 71-00.0N 043-10.0E
 70-10.0N 044-00.0E 70-10.0N 048-50.0E
 69-28.0N 048-50.0E THEN COASTAL LINE TO
 68-42.5N 048-50.0E 68-30.0N 048-50.0E
 68-30.0N 051-48.0E THEN COASTAL LINE TO
 67-58.0N 049-38.0E 68-02.3N 046-29.3E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 67-08.5N 044-10.0E
 67-08.5N 041-18.0E THEN COASTAL LINE TO
 69-18.0N 033-57.0E 70-00.0N 034-00.0E
 70-36.0N 032-05.0E
 B. 67-48.3N 046-40.0E 67-08.5N 045-38.0E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 67-48.3N 046-40.0E
 C. 68-30.0N 052-02.0E 68-30.0N 052-40.0E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-30.0N 052-02.0E
 D. 68-30.0N 053-55.0E 68-30.0N 055-16.0E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-30.0N 053-55.0E
 E. 68-33.0N 056-54.0E 68-37.9N 057-30.0E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-33.0N 056-54.0E
 F. 68-50.0N 059-15.0E 69-03.0N 060-57.9E
 THEN COASTAL LINE TO 68-50.0N 059-15.0E
 2. AREA IS DANGERAOUS TO NAVIGATION
 3. NAVIGATION IN AREA PROHIBITED WITHIN RUSSIAN TERRITORIAL WATERS 
 4. CANCEL THIS MSG 191400 UTC FEB 22
